title: Xtra Gooey Turkish Taleggio Lahmacun
description: A salty and gooey Turkish dish featuring taleggio cheese, perfect for a post-workout meal. This lacquer-glaze lahmacun is kosher-friendly and made with high-quality ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add the olive oil and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a thin circle.
Place the circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread a quarter of the softened taleggio cheese on each circle, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Top the cheese with a quarter of the minced lamb and chopped onion.
Drizzle the lacquer glaze over the lamb and onion.
Bake the lahmacun in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and gooey.
